title: Huawei SFP-10G-SR-eKit, SFP+ optical module, Multi-Mode, 400m, 10G, LC
description: Huawei SFP-10G-SR-eKit is a multi-mode SFP+ module with a maximum throughput of 10Gbps , 850nm wavelength and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 400m (OM4). The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
